title: ficus guyeri var. sibuyanensis
intro: Ficus guyeri var. sibuyanensis, also known as Sibuyan ficus, is a plant species belonging to the Ficus genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ficus guyeri var. sibuyanensis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often made into a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
